title: Laura Harder
compiled_truth: Laura Harder is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-05-16), Laura Harder sent 27 and received 67 emails, totalling 94 interactions. Top correspondents: [Edward Gottlob](people/edward-gottlob) (22), [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (21), [Lauri Allen](people/lauri-allen) (21), [Elsa Villarreal](people/elsa-villarreal) (20), [Carey Metz](people/carey-metz) (19).
